_comment: IANA root KSK trust anchors as published at https://data.iana.org/root-anchors/root-anchors.xml. Captured 2026-05-04. Update when the upstream XML changes (rare — KSK rollovers are signalled months in advance). Currently active KSKs are 20326 and 38696; the historical 19036 key (valid until 2019) is intentionally NOT included here. Tests that need a historical-vector anchor should add it explicitly to a separate fixture.
